provenance.source_citation: PubChem CID 13342; primary-source X-ray: Moncrief & Lipscomb, J. Am. Chem. Soc. 1965, 87, 4963 (DOI 10.1021/ja00949a056).

prompt: Given the uploaded molecule image, return the SMILES for the molecule shown. Do not infer from filename, caption, or prior knowledge. Reproduce the drawn tautomer state exactly — do NOT canonicalize to a chemically-equivalent lactim / enol form.
notes: Thymine — panel-tier image-truth tautomer probe. Tests that the agent reproduces the DRAWN 2,4-dione lactam tautomer (two N-H, two C=O) and does NOT canonicalize to a chemically-equivalent lactim (C=N + OH) form. InChI / RDKit normalization would unify lactam and lactim — image-truth gate in the evaluator vision-compare step must reject lactim answers even when they round-trip to the same canonical SMILES. Failure surface: drawn tautomer / drawn C=O position erasure under canonicalization. Source: PubChem CID 1135. Image fixture shared with D045 (which uses canonical-SMILES grading only); A010 is the panel-tier tautomer-aware probe of the same fixture.

prompt: Given the uploaded molecule image, return the SMILES for the molecule shown. Do not infer from filename, caption, or prior knowledge.
notes: Hemibrevetoxin B — tier-2 calibration row (PLAN-a004-class-robustness-2026-05-22). Marine polyether ladder; K=10, 4 fused tetrahydropyrans. Topology slot: ladder fusion — no prior coverage in manifest. Documented substitution from the original brevetoxin A AB-ring fragment ask (no primary-source K~5 fragment SMILES was located in the sourcing pass; hemibrevetoxin B preserves topology intent). Source: PubChem CID 6442821. Substituted into the brevetoxin-fragment slot (plan documented ≤2-ring cap, K~5; substituted to deliver high-K polyether-ladder coverage which is what that slot tests). 4-ring trans-fused polyether ladder.

provenance.source_citation: PubChem CID 6442821. Substituted into the brevetoxin-fragment slot (plan documented ≤2-ring cap, K~5; substituted to deliver high-K polyether-ladder coverage which is what that slot tests). 4-ring trans-fused polyether ladder.

prompt: Given the uploaded molecule image, return the SMILES for the molecule shown. Do not infer from filename, caption, or prior knowledge.
notes: Image-rebuild v3 phase 5 cardinal-rule POSITIVE control. Vinblastine drawn at a path whose filename DOES contain the scaffold token. Agent must either produce vinblastine SMILES OR call refuse(unreadable_topology) after an honest attempt. In either case, filename_inference_gate must show no scaffold token in pre-build prose.

notes: Vinblastine — tier-2 calibration row (PLAN-a004-class-robustness-2026-05-22). Dimeric Catharanthus indole alkaloid; K~9 saddle clusters across two indoline + indole halves. Topology slot: extends A004 paclitaxel class. Source: PubChem CID 13342; primary-source X-ray: Moncrief & Lipscomb, J. Am. Chem. Soc. 1965, 87, 4963 (DOI 10.1021/ja00949a056). Paired hi-res companion (Indigo 4000x3000) of A009 for vision-tier isolation per Layer 5 spec.

prompt: Given the uploaded molecule image, return the SMILES for the molecule shown. Do not infer from filename, caption, or prior knowledge.
notes: Hemibrevetoxin B — tier-2 calibration row (PLAN-a004-class-robustness-2026-05-22). Marine polyether ladder; K=10, 4 fused tetrahydropyrans. Topology slot: ladder fusion — no prior coverage in manifest. Documented substitution from the original brevetoxin A AB-ring fragment ask (no primary-source K~5 fragment SMILES was located in the sourcing pass; hemibrevetoxin B preserves topology intent). Source: PubChem CID 6442821. Substituted into the brevetoxin-fragment slot (plan documented ≤2-ring cap, K~5; substituted to deliver high-K polyether-ladder coverage which is what that slot tests). 4-ring trans-fused polyether ladder. Paired hi-res companion (Indigo 4000x3000) of A011 for vision-tier isolation per Layer 5 spec.

provenance.source_citation: PubChem CID 6442821. Substituted into the brevetoxin-fragment slot (plan documented ≤2-ring cap, K~5; substituted to deliver high-K polyether-ladder coverage which is what that slot tests). 4-ring trans-fused polyether ladder.
